segments.title: Friendly first contact
segments.subtitle: 这里的陌生人互动让人放松。
segments.reason: Start with human warmth before making the safety claim.

segments.title: Clean and calm streets
segments.subtitle: 街道干净，城市秩序感很强。
segments.reason: Use visible environment evidence to support the theme.

segments.title: Strong proof point
segments.subtitle: 贵重物品放在桌上也没人碰。
segments.reason: Close with a concrete moment viewers can remember.
